steps.title: Identify the key scenario
steps.content: The phrase “two or three individuals” establishes that sometimes multiple people share the Nobel Prize. The blank must describe how a single award is distributed among them.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: "Jointly" means the award is given to multiple recipients at the same time. The other choices address formality, willingness, or timing—none of which describe how a prize is shared. That matches choice C — C is correct.
